query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) VALUES
-- Libya
('Tripoli', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LY'), 1),
('Benghazi', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LY'), 1),
('Misrata', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'LY'), 1),
-- Tunisia
('Tunis', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TN'), 1),
('Sfax', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TN'), 1),
('Sousse', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TN'), 1),
('Kairouan', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TN'), 1),
-- Algeria
('Algiers', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'DZ'), 1),
('Oran', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'DZ'), 1),
('Constantine', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'DZ'), 1),
('Annaba', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'DZ'), 1),
-- Morocco
('Casablanca', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'MA'), 1),
('Rabat', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'MA'), 1),
('Marrakech', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'MA'), 1),
('Fes', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'MA'), 1),
('Tangier', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'MA'), 1),
('Agadir', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'MA'), 1),
-- Sudan
('Khartoum', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SD'), 1),
('Omdurman', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SD'), 1),
('Port Sudan', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'SD'), 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
